equidistant.label: Spatially balanced
equidistant.notes: Greedy max-min coverage with seed-varying first sensor.

kmeans_stratified.label: k-means stratified
kmeans_stratified.notes: NumPy Lloyd k-means with one observed sensor nearest each centroid.

cluster_concentrated.label: Cluster-concentrated
cluster_concentrated.notes: N* nearest sensors to a seed-varying center sensor.

circumferential.label: Circumferential
circumferential.notes: Random N* draw from the high-radial-distance boundary ring.

anti_cluster.label: Anti-cluster
anti_cluster.notes: Greedy max-sum-distance dispersion with seed-varying first sensor.
